mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the RSAFS trend is rising.
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above a restrictive threshold raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS crossings above 4.25% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with weak payroll growth signals labor-market deterioration and future earnings risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises >0.3pp in 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month average job gain falls below 100k
evidence_refs: fact:2025-02-15 snapshot UNRATE was 4.0 and PAYEMS was 159069
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-deterioration episodes have median 60-day S&P 500 forward returns greater than zero or if the interaction term is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production crossing into positive 6-month growth signals improving output and operating leverage, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO crossings above zero 6-month growth are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling materially below their recent trend signal weaker construction demand, credit sensitivity, and softer cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or the average triggered return exceeds the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent CPI inflation together with a non-declining federal funds rate keeps policy restrictive and delays discount-rate relief, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds 3% and FEDFUNDS is at or above its 3-month average
evidence_refs: fact:2025-02-15 snapshot CPIAUCSL was 319.086 and FEDFUNDS was 4.33
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-inflation and non-declining-rate condition produces positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing below a low threshold signals recession risk is receding and household income remains supported, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE crossings below 4.1% are followed by non-positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth above zero while the federal funds rate remains high signals demand resilience despite restrictive policy, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth exceeds 1% and FEDFUNDS remains above 4%
evidence_refs: fact:2025-02-15 snapshot GDPC1 was 23530.909 and FEDFUNDS was 4.33
failure_condition: Reject if the GDPC1 growth and high-FEDFUNDS interaction has a negative coefficient in walk-forward 60-day return regressions or triggered median returns are below zero.
